codeReview.summary: Verification-only feature execution matches the feature contract: .gitignore constraints and git-tracking hygiene were checked, validation commands were run, and required file presence checks were completed; no implementation defects were identified for this feature scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The assigned cleanup-worker skill is primarily execution-oriented (moves, untracking, commit), but this feature was verification-only. The worker had to adapt procedure manually; a dedicated verification variant would reduce unnecessary steps and ambiguity.

sharedStateObservations.observation: There is contradictory guidance about .factory tracking between generic worker guidance and mission-specific policy, which required ad-hoc resolution during execution.
